qa_pairs.question: How can Co-Principal Investigators (Co-PIs) update their Canadian Common CV (CCV) for a Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) application?
qa_pairs.answer: Co-Principal Investigators (Co-PIs) can update their Canadian Common CV (CCV) on the CCDB portal by clicking "Update CCV" on the Resource Applications page, or by navigating to "My Account → View Reporting." The updated status will automatically reflect in the RAC online application form.

qa_pairs.question: Are deadline extensions granted for a Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) application if a Canadian Common CV (CCV) is missing?
qa_pairs.answer: No, deadline extensions are not possible for a Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) application if Canadian Common CVs (CCVs) are missing. Applicants should plan ahead to avoid delays.
